scoring.evidence: Cache invalidation now covers lib/utils/types/server/pages/skills/hooks. Health gate breakdown shows struct/hygiene sub-bullets. Stage ceiling shows actionable celebration. Gates are true gates with no override. Per-feature sort worst-first with delta arrows.

gaps: Traceability is convention not code: predictions cite experiment-learnings by LLM convention, no mechanical validation that evidence column references a known pattern or declares exploration.

Consolidator agent exists but only wired to /retro — not triggered after grade.sh runs. Knowledge consolidation happens mechanically via grade-consolidation.sh but the agent (which could do richer analysis) is unused.
Self-diagnostic Learn system (bin/self.sh) allocates 25 points but only tests 5-8 mechanically. No trend detection, no quality assessment of the knowledge model itself.
learning.evidence: The feedback loop is now closed. session-context.sh reads experiment-learnings.md for model weaknesses (wrong prediction areas) and dead ends (blocks re-proposing). grade.sh produces mechanism-based model_updates, rejects tautological confirmations, warns on vague predictions, and warns before expiration. experiment-learnings.md is structured (7 Known, 7 Uncertain, 8 Unknown, 1 Dead End) with evidence citations — pruned from 199 to 67 lines. session_start.sh shows accuracy with trend (last 5 vs previous 5), calibration context, and wrong prediction areas. trail.sh renders session evidence with 600+ session files. Predictions: 89% graded (8/9). The remaining gaps are: traceability by convention not code, consolidator agent unused, self-diagnostic shallow.
